items.title: Hollinger POTD Hanno Möttölä. Finnish PF went to Utah was drafted 40th in 2000 by ATL.  Made team as jump shooting big (4.6 ppg 3 rpg in 15 mpg from 2000-02). After 02, went to Europe where he played all over thru 2013. Coached in Finland from 2014-24. Now coaching in Australia.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Hanno Möttölä. Finnish PF went to Utah was drafted 40th in 2000 by ATL.  Made team as jump shooting big (4.6 ppg 3 rpg in 15 mpg from 2000-02). After 02, went to Europe where he played all over thru 2013. Coached in Finland from 2014-24. Now coaching in Australia.

items.title: In the first Knicks Championship parade in over 53 years, James Dolan and NYC politicians got 13 minutes of podium mic time. All Knicks players combined got 2 minutes of podium mic time, including 0 minutes for KAT, OG, and Alvarado
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: I remember when Championship parades used to have end of the bench guys going crazy. Those were so fun. For example, Steve Kerr once had a legendary moment during a Bulls parade. Aaron Wiggins was also funny last year. Instead, this year we had to listen to Dolan and a bunch of…

items.title: The Sparks have signed Kiana Williams. Here’s Sparks General Manager Raegan Pebley's statement on the move.
items.author: Edwin Garcia
items.body_excerpt:
The Sparks have signed Kiana Williams. Here’s Sparks General Manager Raegan Pebley's statement on the move.

“We’re excited to add Kiana to our roster. She is a consummate professional whose work ethic, basketball IQ and passing ability will strengthen our group and add depth to our guard position.”
